title: The Blonde Witch
writer: Paul Andréota, Jacques Companéez, Christiane Imbert
actors: Marina Vlady, Maurice Ronet, Nicole Courcel
plot: Brulard, a French civil engineer on assignment in Sweden for a lumber company meets Ina, a local nature-girl type, falls in love, has an affair, tries to convert her to "civilization", but ends up getting her killed by superstitio...
